entry_bad_risk_head.description: Predicts whether the candidate is a bad-entry route label, independent of entry timing.

entry_winner_preservation_head.description: Predicts whether the candidate should be preserved as an optimal or runner opportunity.

entry_ready_head.description: Predicts whether the current checkpoint is at or after the oracle best-entry trigger.

management_exit_risk_head.description: Predicts whether the position-management state calls for an exit, scratch, or protect action.

management_runner_preservation_head.description: Predicts whether the position state should preserve a runner or active winner.
